category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vedic as a simple Sanskrit programming language.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README presents the project as Vedic Programming Language; source_facts.name provides vedic.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states Vedic documentation is available at vedic-lang.github.io, matching source_facts.homepage.

tags_sources: source_facts.description says Simple Sanskrit programming language; official GitHub README describes a Sanskrit programming language interpreter written in Rust.
